evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Building and owning high quality dbt models, ensuring they are performant, well documented and thoroughly tested; Champion best practices for data modelling, transformation, and governance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, testing, documentation, and governance champion role dominate—reliability and best practices take priority over speed.
evidence.domain_risk: Building a better financial world; core to our mission; key asset that everyone across the organisation has a part to play; Funding Circle small business lending platform; P&L impact
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Fintech lending platform where data accuracy directly impacts business decisions and customer outcomes—high consequence for errors.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Central data team reports to VP of Data; Analysts and Data Scientists; multiple teams across domains; established Analytics Engineering function
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established data function with VP-level oversight, multiple teams, domains, and governance—mature data organization building 'top tier Analytics Engineering function'.
evidence.jd_authorship: Building and owning high quality dbt models, ensuring they are performant, well documented and thoroughly tested; building high impact data models to power critical reporting and self-serve analytics; Consult on our evolving data platform, advising on the tooling, infrastructure and practices
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical context (dbt models, dimensional modelling, AWS services, Airflow, data warehouses) shows hiring manager detail about analytics engineering infrastructure work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Collaborating with Analysts and Data Scientists; Empowering our circlers to become highly data fluent and confident self serve users; creating data products across all domains
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is building data platform and enabling self-serve analytics for internal users—internal data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Building and owning high quality dbt models; Champion best practices; Consult on our evolving data platform; help build a top tier Analytics Engineering function; Act as a technical bridge and mentor
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role owns model quality, champions practices, advises on platform direction, and mentors others—strategic technical leadership with execution across domains.
evidence.ai_role: Able to architect custom AI solutions and smart automated systems; Act as a technical bridge and mentor, training builders across the company to move from basic AI usage to sophisticated system creation
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate is expected to build data infrastructure that AI systems consume and mentor others on AI system creation.
evidence.testing_framing: Ensuring they are performant, well documented and thoroughly tested; Champion best practices for data modelling, transformation, and governance
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is an owned responsibility and championed best practice—candidate is accountable for quality and testing strategy.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Building a better financial world; core to our mission; data is our key asset; Champion best practices for data modelling, transformation, and governance; thoroughly tested
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High emphasis on data as core asset, governance, and mission-critical reliability—fear is data failures harming the platform and fintech operations.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: help shape the data foundations for high growth areas; unique opportunity to help build a top tier Analytics Engineering function; Creating data products across all domains; Enhancing our world class data platform; Transforming our business
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Language emphasizes building, shaping, and transforming rather than maintaining—both greenfield platform building and strategic transformation work.
evidence.loss_aversion: Data is our key asset that everyone across the organisation has a part to play; Champion best practices for data modelling, transformation, and governance; thoroughly tested. Role emphasizes data governance and reliability as mission-critical.
